rationale: Empirically re-verified at commit 99a6bd5a. go build + go vet exit 0; all 5 target suites PASS (-count=1); layout+gitutil also PASS under -race; gofmt -l empty on all 11 changed files; worktree git status clean after the run; live .mindspec/docs untouched and no project-docs leaked at the live root (every test uses t.TempDir()). harness intentionally not run. The new round-2 tests are GENUINE, not asserted-but-untested. TestMover_DogfoodAndReviewMoves drives the FULL move set: dogfood evicts to project-docs/ (mustNotExist docs/user proves it is NOT a root-docs alias); the depth-change links resolve with ZERO dangling under doctor.CheckMovedTreeLinks (project-docs was added to movedTreeRoots); panel.json-spec routing (non-numeric zzz-custom, only panel.json can place it) AND slug-prefix fallback (099-final-panel, no panel.json) are each isolated; review/prep is left in place AND recorded in manifest.Skipped; lineage asserts all 6 symmetric+dogfood+review source→dest groups. RollbackAfterDogfoodReview fails after the landed user-group (index 5) move commit and asserts HEAD==preRun, canonical tree restored, no project-docs/.mindspec/specs leak, porcelain empty. TestCleanForcePaths_ScopedToRoots proves an untracked file OUTSIDE the scoped roots survives. The stageRootRewrite(-1) crash boundary now fires errSimulatedCrash and resumes correctly. R6 integration blocker and R5 rollback major are genuinely closed; no new blocker found.

findings.issue: go build + go vet exit 0; gofmt -l empty on all 11 changed files; all 5 target suites PASS (-count=1); internal/layout + internal/gitutil also PASS under -race; worktree git status clean post-run; live .mindspec/docs untouched. internal/harness intentionally not run.

TestMover_DogfoodAndReviewMoves: dogfood moves land at project-docs/{user,installation,research}/ with mustNotExist(docs/user) proving NOT a root-docs/ alias; guide.md absolute adr link rewritten to flat .mindspec/adr/, symmetric sibling ../installation/setup.md preserved, README rewritten to project-docs path; doctor.CheckMovedTreeLinks returns ZERO dangling (project-docs added to movedTreeRoots in links.go).

panel.json-spec routing isolated via non-numeric slug zzz-custom (only panel.json `spec` can place it) → .mindspec/specs/106-layout-flatten/reviews/zzz-custom/; slug-prefix fallback isolated via 099-final-panel (no panel.json) → .mindspec/specs/099-prior/reviews/099-final-panel/; un-routable review/prep left in place AND recorded in manifest.Skipped; lineage want-map asserts all 6 symmetric+dogfood+review source→canonical groups.

TestMover_RollbackAfterDogfoodReview injects failAt=stageAfterMoveCommit group 5 (the user dogfood group, index 5 of DefaultFlattenPlan) so a dogfood eviction lands before failure, then asserts HEAD==preRun, .mindspec/docs/user + review/zzz-custom restored, project-docs and .mindspec/specs absent, and `git status --porcelain` empty (scoped clean left no residue). Genuine.

TestCleanForcePaths_ScopedToRoots (gitutil) creates untracked residue under .mindspec/migrations/ (inside scope) AND user-scratch.txt at repo root (outside), then asserts the scoped clean removes the former and PRESERVES the latter — the exact R5 rollback-safety property for live-tree Bead-5 reuse.

stageRootRewrite(-1) boundary added to TestMover_CrashResumeEveryBoundary; checkpoint fires errSimulatedCrash at that boundary (mover.go:502) and the resumed run rewrites moved/a.md with a clean tree — closes my round-1 gap that the root-rewrite boundary was not separately crash-tested.

doctor TestLineageManifestParsesUnderSchema remains a contract test (hand-written manifest fixture rather than invoking the mover); mitigated because layout TestMover_LineageManifest + TestMover_DogfoodAndReviewMoves parse the ACTUALLY written manifest and the State/LineageManifest extra keys (plan_resolved/plan/skipped) are documented as ignored-unknown by the doctor schema. Acceptable; non-blocking.
